description: MCP server for structured methods extraction + reproducibility heuristics on academic papers.
name: io.github.FlynnLachendro/methods-mcp

environmentVariables.description: Required for LLM-driven extraction tools (extract_methods, summarize_paper, methods_repro_review).
environmentVariables.name: ANTHROPIC_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Optional. Raises the GitHub REST API rate limit used by reproducibility assessment.
environmentVariables.name: GITHUB_TOKEN

environmentVariables.description: Override the default Claude model (default: claude-sonnet-4-6).
environmentVariables.name: METHODS_MCP_MODEL

title: methods-mcp
